revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 128x32 pixel-art sprite sheet for a game-development asset. Canvas must be exactly 128x32px, arranged as 1 row x 4 equal columns, each frame 32x32px. Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, no gradients.

Style/profile: SNES 16-bit platformer pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent limited palette, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left light source. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: muted matcha and moss greens with vermilion-and-white accents, bright cheerful colors.

Character: original enemy sprite, gentle-eerie but NOT scary: a kodama-like tree-spirit tainted by impurity, a small round wooden sprite with a leaf sprouting from its head, bark-pattern body, glowing amber dot-eyes, hovering slightly above the ground, with dark purple impurity haze swirling at its base. No bird or companion creature.

Animation: compact readable enemy idle hover loop across exactly 4 frames in the single row. Frame 1 neutral hover. Frame 2 drifts up slightly and the head leaf spins/reposes. Frame 3 highest point, body tilts slightly. Frame 4 settles down for loop. Same exact character identity and same scale in every frame. Keep head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, and limb thickness identical across all frames. Re-pose only; do not redraw/restyle/resize. Standing body height in pixels must match across all upright frames.

Containment: every frame stays inside its own 32x32 cell with clear solid magenta margin between the figure and every cell edge. No content crosses cell boundaries.

Sheet cleanliness: do not draw cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermarks anywhere. No detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no seam slivers, no dust specks, no leftover effect residue. The purple haze should be attached/readable as the base effect under the sprite, not loose debris.

Avoid all protected or franchise likenesses: no Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.
